title: Vladimir Putin and Xi Jinping to speak on Friday
description: Europe News: Russian President Vladimir Putin will speak with Chinese President Xi Jinping via video link on Friday, the Kremlin said.
keywords: Xi Jinping, Vladimir Putin, Kremlin spokesman, kremlin, Dmitry Peskov
